profile.name: Manas Ranjan Sahoo
profile.title: Full Stack Developer
profile.description: B.S. Data Science student at IIT Madras with hands-on experience in building full-stack web applications. Passionate about creating impactful digital solutions using React, Flask, and modern web technologies.

points: Led and managed a 15-member volunteer team across 15 cultural events, coordinating logistics, scheduling, and execution while working simultaneously with over 4 departments to ensure smooth delivery for 100+ attendees per event.
Owned sponsorship operations and resource allocation for all events, negotiating and managing 1.5 lakh INR in budgets and at least 2 lakh INR worth of sponsorship deliverables.
Acted as the Point of Contact (POC) between the Culturals Department and the Talent Hunt event, contributing to the evaluation of 80+ submissions during Margazhi.
Working as a Full-Stack Intern building their first end-to-end web presence with a thematically dramatic, performance-oriented frontend to showcase plays, artists, and social work.
Designing and developing the full-stack architecture using React (frontend) and Flask + MySQL (backend) to manage structured archival data, media, and content.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (B.S.) - Data Science and Applications

projects.title: YatriRakshak
projects.description: A tourist safety platform shortlisted in the Top 50 teams at the IIT Madras internal hackathon for SIH.
points: Led a 6-member team to build YatriRakshak, a comprehensive tourist safety platform.
Implemented PNR-based trip tracking, geo-fenced restricted zones, police dashboard management, and real-time zone violation alerts.
Developed SOS activation, live location sharing, medical detail alerts, in-app FIR registration, and police monitoring.

projects.title: ParkSync
projects.description: A Flask-based parking management system with role-based user and admin panels.
points: Built a comprehensive parking management system with role-based user and admin panels.
Enabled slot booking, dynamic hourly pricing, and full CRUD control over parking lots.
Implemented using Flask with HTML and Jinja templates for the frontend.
